---
title: "G85R TKT Rescue Sex Specific Eclosion and Survival"
author: "John Santiago"
date: "2026-05-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```


```{r}
library(beeswarm)

eclosion.data = read.csv("/Users/johncsantiago/Documents/GitHub/WhartonLab/G85R TKT Sex Specific Eclosion/20260518 Eclosion.csv")

eclosion.data$Genotype = factor(eclosion.data$Genotype,
                                levels = c("WT", "G85R",
                                           "WT, TKT-Df", "G85R, TKT-Df",
                                           "WT, TKT-OE", "G85R, TKT-OE"))

boxplot(eclosion.data$X..Eclosed~eclosion.data$Genotype,
        cex = .5,
        boxwex = .5,
        cex.axis = .75,
        xlab = "Genotype",
        ylab = "Percent Eclosed",
        ylim = c(0, 100),
        border = c("steelblue", "cyan",
              "gold", "yellow",
              "darkgreen", "limegreen",
              "firebrick", "red"))

beeswarm(eclosion.data$X..Eclosed
         ~eclosion.data$Genotype,
         add = T,
       pch = 21,
       cex = 1,
       spacing = 1,
       bg = c("steelblue", "cyan",
              "gold", "yellow",
              "forestgreen", "green",
              "firebrick", "red"))


```


```{r}
library(beeswarm)

eclosion.data = read.csv("/Users/johncsantiago/Documents/GitHub/WhartonLab/G85R TKT Sex Specific Eclosion/20260518 Eclosion.csv")


eclosion.data$Genotype = factor(eclosion.data$Genotype,
                                levels = c("WT", "G85R",
                                           "WT, TKT-Df", "G85R, TKT-Df",
                                           "WT, TKT-OE", "G85R, TKT-OE"))


boxplot(eclosion.data$X..Partial~eclosion.data$Genotype,
        cex = .5,
        boxwex = .5,
        cex.axis = .75,
        xlab = "Genotype",
        ylab = "Percent partially eclosed",
        ylim = c(0, 100),
        border = c("steelblue", "cyan",
              "gold", "yellow",
              "darkgreen", "limegreen",
              "firebrick", "red"))

beeswarm(eclosion.data$X..Partial
         ~eclosion.data$Genotype,
         add = T,
       pch = 21,
       cex = 1,
       spacing = 1,
       bg = c("steelblue", "cyan",
              "gold", "yellow",
              "forestgreen", "green",
              "firebrick", "red"))


```

```{r fig.width=15, fig.height=9}

ss.eclosion.data = read.csv("/Users/johncsantiago/Documents/GitHub/WhartonLab/G85R TKT Sex Specific Eclosion/20260518 Sex Specific Eclosion.csv")

temp.ssed = ss.eclosion.data[,c("Genotype", "total", "F.", "M.")]
temp.ssed = t(temp.ssed)
colnames(temp.ssed) = temp.ssed["Genotype",]
temp.ssed = temp.ssed[c("total", "F.", "M."),]
temp.ssed["total",] = paste0("n = ", temp.ssed["total",]) 

barplot(height = temp.ssed[c("F.", "M."),],
        cex.axis = .5)

text(x = c(.7, 1.9, 3.1, 4.3, 5.5, 6.7, 7.9), y = 105, labels = c(temp.ssed["total", ]), xpd = T)

abline(h = 50, lty = 2, lwd =2, col = "red")

```


```{r fig.width=15, fig.height=9}

pe.eclosion.data = read.csv("/Users/johncsantiago/Documents/GitHub/WhartonLab/G85R TKT Sex Specific Eclosion/20260518 Partial Eclosion Summary.csv", row.names =1, header = F)
pe.eclosion.data = as.matrix(pe.eclosion.data)

barplot(height = pe.eclosion.data[c("Eclosed", "Partially Eclosed", "Not Eclosed"),],
        names.arg = pe.eclosion.data["Genotype",],
        cex.axis = .5)



```



```{r fig.width=8, fig.height=6}


##trying survminer
library(survival)
library(survminer)

sse.surv.data = read.csv("/Users/johncsantiago/Documents/GitHub/WhartonLab/G85R TKT Sex Specific Eclosion/20260518 Survdata.csv")

sse.surv.data$Group <- interaction(sse.surv.data$Genotype, sse.surv.data$Sex, sse.surv.data$TKT)

fit <- survfit(
  Surv(time, status) ~ Group,
  data = sse.surv.data
)

```


```{r fig.width=8, fig.height=6}


my_palette = c("green", "cyan",
               "forestgreen","steelblue",
               "deeppink", "gold",
               "firebrick", "yellow")


palette(my_palette) 

ggsurvplot(fit,
           palette = my_palette)

```
